candidates.why: Appears to be a generic header or placeholder, with no visible amounts; weaker than the explicit summary row below.

Explicit separate operating D&A line at the same level as other operating expense rows. Relative to selected XSGA rows (Payroll and Related Expenses, Other Operating Expenses, Research and development expenses), this appears to sit outside/alongside them rather than as an indented sub-component. Prefer this summary row over any components.
This looks like a component within Other Operating Expenses, and it has no visible amounts. Even if relevant, the summary row 'Depreciation & Amortization' is preferable to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: OK. Selected the separate summary D&A line because it appears as its own operating expense row above EBIT and outside the previously selected XSGA component rows. Did not select 'Depreciation in Other Operating Expense' because it appears subordinate to Other Operating Expenses and would risk double counting; did not select the generic 'Depreciation' header because the summary row is clearer.
